div.table:
Check if invoices include different currencies
Invoice Date
Invoice Number
Reference
Add a column if there are different currencies
Amount In Currency
Amount

tr.t-att-class: 'fw-bold o_line_section' if line.display_type == 'line_section' else 'fst-italic o_line_note' if line.display_type == 'line_note' else ''

t.t-value: ', '.join([(tax.invoice_label or tax.name) for tax in line.tax_ids])

td.span: A note, whose content usually applies to the section or product above.

div.style: padding: 8px; border: 1px solid #000; width: 330px; display: inline-block; font-size: 13px
div.span: Thirty one dollar and Five cents

div.p: (Please check correctness of entries in the document within 7 days, otherwise document deemed accepted.)

td.p: Payment will be considered complete once the company has received the funds.

td.style: border: none !important; width: 20%; padding: 8px; text-align: center; vertical-align: bottom;

p.style: margin: 0 auto; margin-bottom: 8px; width: 100%; height: 1px; border: 1px solid #d5d5d5

td.style: border: none; width: 20%; padding: 8px; text-align: center; vertical-align: bottom;

p.style: margin: 0 auto; margin-bottom: 8px; width: 100%; height: 1px; border: 1px solid #d5d5d5

td.style: border: none; width: 20%; text-align: center; vertical-align: middle;
border: none; width: 20%; padding: 8px; text-align: center; vertical-align: bottom;

p.style: margin: 0 auto; margin-bottom: 8px; width: 100%; height: 1px; border: 1px solid #d5d5d5

td.style: border: none; width: 20%; padding: 8px; text-align: center; vertical-align: bottom;

p.style: margin: 0 auto; margin-bottom: 8px; width: 100%; height: 1px; border: 1px solid #d5d5d5

td.style: background-color: transparent !important; border: none; vertical-align: top;
td.p: Payment will be considered complete once the company has received the funds.

table.style: background-color: transparent !important; margin-top: 32px; border: none !important; width: 100%

td.style: background-color: transparent !important; border: none !important; width: 45%; padding: 8px; text-align: center; vertical-align: bottom;
background-color: transparent !important; border: none !important; width: 20%; padding: 8px; text-align: center; vertical-align: top;
background-color: transparent !important; border: none !important; width: 35%; padding: 8px; text-align: center; vertical-align: bottom;
